titleStmt.title: SII 38.524: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 524. (A.R. No. 524 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the second gōpura, left of entrance, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Vīrapratāpa Achyutadēva Mahārāya. Year: Śaka 1463, Śārvarin Kaṉṉi, śu. di. 10 = 15th September 1541 A.D. But the cyclic year was Pḷava.

summary.p: Damaged at the end. The king is endowed with a string of Sāḷuva birudas, em-maṇḍalamum madikka, Īḻam tiṟai-koṇḍāṉ, Navakōḍinārāyaṇaṉ, Sōmakulatilakaṉ, Pātāḷabhayaṅkaraṉ etc.,

It records that a certain Birāmi Nachchi Nāyakkar, son of Raṅgappa Nāyakkar, royal official (śvāmi-ūḻiyam), issued a charitable deed through which he donated forty poṉ to the temple treasury for conducting special offerings and worship, on the occasion of the car festival, to the god Tuyyamāmaṇi-nayiṉār, for the merit of the ruler Achchudaiyadēva-mahārāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī § maṉ makāmaṇṭalecuraṉ metiṉi micura kaṇṭakaṭṭāri cāḷuva Ariyarāyar vipāṭaṉ pāṣaikkutappuvarāyakaṇṭaṉ mūvarāyarkaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭuko
ṇṭa nāṭu koṭātāṉ tulakka taḷa vipāṭaṉ tulukka mokaraṉ tavittāṉ Emmaṇṭalamum matikka Īḻantiṟai koṇṭāṉ navakoṭi nārāyaṇaṉ koṭi
ppiṟatāpaṉ comakula tilakaṉ coma vaṅkiṣātipaṉ pātaḷa payaṅkaraṉ pātaḷa kulatīpaṉ pūṟupatekṣaṇa paccima camuttirāti
vīrappiṟatāpaṉ Accutayatevamakārāyar pirutivīrācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 6 10 3 Itaṉ mel cellā niṉṟa cāṟuvari caṅvaccarattu kaṉṉināyaṟṟu pūṟuva
pūcanakṣattiramum tecamiyum peṟṟa cukkiravārattu nāḷ cuvāmi Ūḻiyam Iraṅkappanāyakkari puttiraṉ pirāmi naccināyakkar Ūṟṟattūr nāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūr Uṭaiya
māmaṇi nayiṉār tirukkoyilukku tirutterutirunāḷ Upaiyattu kuṭutta tarmmacāsaṉa paṭṭaiyam kuṭuttapaṭi Ūṟṟattūrnāṭu mālavāyc cīrmai
ttya ril tirukkoyil paṇṭārattil puṟavari ṭu kuṭutta � 100 ç Intappoṉ nāṟpatum cuvāmi Accutaiteva makārāyar(ṟ)ku
māka Uṭaiyār tuyyamāmaṇinayiṉār tirutter tirunāḷ Uvaiyattu Inta nāṟpatu poṉṉum kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭu Ināṭṭāṟku rekaiyi
l kaḻittu Uttāra ttāpam Inta nāṟpatu poṉṉum cuvāmi Accutaiya tevamakārāyaṟku tarmamāka tirutter tiruṉāḷ Upaiyam cantirādhit
tavaraiyum naṭakka kaṭavatākavum Inta tammattukkuThe letter ku is engraved below.yātāmaruttarRead yātomoruttar Akitam paṇṇiṉate Uṇṭāṉāl keṅkaikaraiyil kārām pacuvaikkoṉṟa paṟa to
Digital edition of SII 38.524 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
